name: @clearline/data-access-cards
description: Cards data-access layer for clearline-web (US-CW-014): React Query hooks over /api/cards/* (wallet list, single card, issuance context, issue, freeze) plus a useTransactionFeed hook that owns a real-time WebSocket connection with a connecting/open/reconnecting state machine and exponential reconnect backoff. Surfaces the server's 4xx as typed errors. No UI, no business rules — those live in libs/ui and libs/domain/cards.

metadata.scope: Data-access lib for EPIC-CW-008 (US-CW-014 Virtual Card Issuance & Real-Time Controls).
